---
title: "security_scan.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\security_scan.py"
loc: 97
complexity: 21
logic_score: 3.55
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 3.05
overall_score: 1.35
---

## Intent
The `security_scan.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, SecurityScanner, __init__, scan, _analyze_web_script, _regex_scan, _analyze_ast, _scan_imports, _scan_constants, report. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, SecurityScanner, __init__, scan, _analyze_web_script, _regex_scan, _analyze_ast, _scan_imports, _scan_constants, report. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [ast](file://ast)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [sv_engine](file://sv_engine)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_bottom`
- `SecurityScanner`
- `__init__`
- `scan`
- `_analyze_web_script`
- `_regex_scan`
- `_analyze_ast`
- `_scan_imports`
- `_scan_constants`
- `report`
